districts.name: Cloth Gate
districts.summary: Travel cloaks and tariff banners argue in color before anyone opens their mouth.
districts.featureDescription: Every imported cloth looks briefly guilty beneath the frame's imperial gray thread.

districts.name: Argument Market
districts.summary: Dyers and brokers sell thread by defending it loudly against every neighboring color.
districts.featureDescription: Anyone may add one row, provided it contradicts the pattern intelligently.

districts.name: Loom Quarter
districts.summary: Shuttle-rods clatter behind bright walls where patterns carry gossip faster than speech.
districts.featureDescription: Its cloth updates whenever a runner knots new information into the warp.

landmarks.name: the unraveling road
landmarks.description: A strip of woven paving comes loose at sunset and is rolled back into place by dawn.
